summary: A Go-based monolithic project with an MCP integration layer and a heavy emphasis on automated test generation and flakiness detection.
concerns: high volume of agent-generated extra test directories suggests potential flakiness or unstable test suites
FEAT-044 flakiness detector indicates ongoing reliability issues with tests
scattered test files across multiple GOrchestra agent directories may lead to maintenance overhead
uncommitted modified and staged files in working tree
suggestions: consolidate or clean up the numerous GOrchestra agent test directories
prioritize stabilizing flaky tests using the new FEAT-044 flakiness detector
review and commit the currently staged and modified changes
consider centralizing extra test logic to reduce duplication across agent directories
